header.role: Power Apps Developer • Backend Developer • Data Analyst
header.objective: Objective: to work in technology, with a focus on backend development and data-driven solutions, contributing to the creation of scalable, well-structured systems, applying sound engineering practices and continuously improving to generate real impact on products and business outcomes.

summary.text: Developer with experience in Power Apps, Power Fx, Dataverse and Power BI, building internal applications, business rules, access controls, registration workflows, filters, collections, integrations and management processes. I also have experience in backend development with TypeScript and Node.js, API development and integration with relational and non-relational databases. My background includes data and industrial automation projects, with hands-on work in governance, process monitoring, information structuring and decision support using tools such as InfluxDB, Node-RED, Grafana and Power BI.

neurosia.item1: Development and evolution of internal solutions with Power Apps, Dataverse and Microsoft ecosystem tools, including applications integrated with Microsoft Teams.
neurosia.item2: Creation of screens, business rules, access controls, registration workflows, filters, collections, integrations and management flows for ceremonies, groups, users, indicators and operational processes.
neurosia.item3: Optimization of user experience, correction of inconsistencies, performance improvements, information governance and data structuring to support decision-making.
neurosia.technologies: Technologies: Power Apps, Power Fx, Dataverse, Microsoft Teams, Power BI, automation and low-code solutions.

ambevSaoLuis.item2: Led initiatives related to data governance, information structuring and the dissemination of best practices across involved teams.
ambevSaoLuis.item3: Delivered training on implemented tools, routines and processes.
ambevSaoLuis.technologies: Technologies: InfluxDB, Node-RED, Grafana, Power BI, OPC and PLC.
